'''鈭歳-h-th-k''' ('''karahthekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waft|waft]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-h-th-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waft|waft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-h-th-k
|-
! Lemma
| karahthekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirahthekoko|thirahthekoko]] || [[word:jirahthekoko|jirahthekoko]] || [[word:shirahthekoko|shirahthekoko]] || [[word:kirahthekoko|kirahthekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurahthekoko|thuthurahthekoko]] || [[word:jujurahthekoko|jujurahthekoko]] || [[word:shushurahthekoko|shushurahthekoko]] || [[word:kukurahthekoko|kukurahthekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurahthekoko|thurahthekoko]] || [[word:jurahthekoko|jurahthekoko]] || [[word:shurahthekoko|shurahthekoko]] || [[word:kurahthekoko|kurahthekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurahthekoko|thurahthekoko]] || [[word:jurahthekoko|jurahthekoko]] || [[word:shurahthekoko|shurahthekoko]] || [[word:kurahthekoko|kurahthekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therahthekoko|therahthekoko]] || [[word:jerahthekoko|jerahthekoko]] || [[word:sherahthekoko|sherahthekoko]] || [[word:kerahthekoko|kerahthekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorahthekoko|thothorahthekoko]] || [[word:jojorahthekoko|jojorahthekoko]] || [[word:shoshorahthekoko|shoshorahthekoko]] || [[word:kokorahthekoko|kokorahthekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorahthekoko|thorahthekoko]] || [[word:jorahthekoko|jorahthekoko]] || [[word:shorahthekoko|shorahthekoko]] || [[word:korahthekoko|korahthekoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorahthekoko|thorahthekoko]] || [[word:jorahthekoko|jorahthekoko]] || [[word:shorahthekoko|shorahthekoko]] || [[word:korahthekoko|korahthekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙rahthekoko|th忙rahthekoko]] || [[word:j忙rahthekoko|j忙rahthekoko]] || [[word:sh忙rahthekoko|sh忙rahthekoko]] || [[word:k忙rahthekoko|k忙rahthekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharahthekoko|thatharahthekoko]] || [[word:jajarahthekoko|jajarahthekoko]] || [[word:shasharahthekoko|shasharahthekoko]] || [[word:kakarahthekoko|kakarahthekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharahthekoko|tharahthekoko]] || [[word:jarahthekoko|jarahthekoko]] || [[word:sharahthekoko|sharahthekoko]] || [[word:karahthekoko|karahthekoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharahthekoko|tharahthekoko]] || [[word:jarahthekoko|jarahthekoko]] || [[word:sharahthekoko|sharahthekoko]] || [[word:karahthekoko|karahthekoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sharahthekithi|sharahthekithi]] || [[word:sharahthekiji|sharahthekiji]] || [[word:sharahthekishi|sharahthekishi]] || [[word:sharahthekiki|sharahthekiki]]
